steps.title: Locate the walnut price data
steps.content: According to the legend, walnuts are represented by light gray bars. The task is to identify which of the four seasons shows the lowest bar height for walnuts.

steps.title: Compare walnut bar heights across seasons
steps.content: The light gray walnut bar in the 2018/19 season is the shortest of the four, reaching approximately \$0.70 per pound. The bars for 2016/17, 2017/18, and 2019/20 are all taller. That matches choice C — C is correct.
